name: Endive Hors D'oeuvre Hawaiian
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim about 1/2 inch from the bottom of the endive; separate and wash the leaves.
2. Drain well on paper towel.
3. Stir together cream cheese, kiwi, pineapple and shallot until well combined.
4. Spoon about 1 teaspoon of the mixture into each leaf.
5. Arrange endive on platter, cover with plastic wrap and chill until serving time.
